feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Subcontracting providing components to the vendor (SD > MM)
entry.content:
have a scenario where:

When a customer requests a sales material X, I provide components X1 and X2 to a subcontractor, who then completes material X and delivers it directly.

How would you resolve this?

I believe the ideal approach is:

  • Creation of a Sales Order with material X.
  • Automatic creation of a Purchase Requisition (PR) with the subcontractor vendor determined automatically.
  • Automatic creation of a Purchase Order (PO) (using RM06BB30) from the PR with the BOM of material X exploded.

Have you implemented something like this? Do you think this is the most appropriate approach? 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Error to create sales order (error 8B 213)
entry.content:
Our company is trying to place an intercompany Sales Order for Brazil Sales Org. against an US plant. The system is returning an error related to Business Plant and Plant. 

Business place not found for company XXXX plant XXXX

Message no. 8B213

Other company codes are already working with this format of Sales order. The problem occur only for Brazil. At the configuration in SAP for Plant and Business Place there is no option to include a new entry. In configuration the only option is to change the entries that are already there.

entry.title: Empty batch in vl10c->background
entry.content:
Hi, experts why i'm getting an emty batch, when i'm creating a delivery with vl10c->background from sales order.
When i go with va02->Sales Document-> Deliver everything good.
also it's good with vl10c->dialog

entry.title: Standard Prepayment process in SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have completed the functional configuration for the standard prepayment process. However, I am not confident about how the SD pricing condition types AZWA, AZWB, and AZDI are functioning. Could someone please clarify how these conditions are expected to behave in the sales order, pro forma/down payment invoice, and final invoice?

For example:- I created a sales order and saved it, but noticed that the pricing condition types AZWA, AZWB, and AZDI are appearing with zero value. I then tried to create a pro forma/down payment invoice (FAZ), and again observed that these condition types are showing as zero. I received the payment using transaction code F-29 for the above pro forma/down payment invoice.

Subsequently, I proceeded to create the delivery and final invoice (F2), but once more, the pricing condition types AZWA, AZWB, and AZDI were displayed with zero value. attached the screenshot for reference.

Could someone kindly share their expertise and provide guidance on this process? Am I missing something or doing anything incorrectly?

Best regards,

Subhramanyu

entry.title: Configuration of Multiple VAT Rates in Sales Orders in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
I am a junior functional consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Sales and Distribution. Another consultant has asked me to investigate a tax-related topic within Sales Orders in S/4HANA, and I’m still becoming familiar with the system. Within the sales order, in the tax breakdown section, is it possible to apply two VAT rates at the same time, for example 8% and 16%? Can this be configured based on location?
Is it possible to enter taxes manually, or is it fully dependent on the Business Partner master data? I’m based in Mexico. Thank you for your support!

entry.title: if the next order is processed in VF01 SAP, an invoice without items is created.
entry.content:
Hello, everybody.

S4Hana

In transaction VF01 I process the first order - invoice is created, no errors. Then, without leaving the VF01 transaction, I specify the next order, but two invoices are created during processing. The first one is correct and corresponds to the order, the second one is erroneous with empty data, without item lines. The time of creation is identical in the two invoices. If I continue to process new orders, the invoices are created three, four, etc. The first invoice in the set is correct, the other invoices are empty with no line items.

I understand that this is a program error, not settings, because there is a parallel ERP system (not S4Hana) and there is no such error, and the settings are the same. I can't find a note to fix the error.

entry.title: Slow update - RSM13000 (SAPMV45A/SAPMV60A/SAPMV75A/SAPMV56A...)
entry.content:
Hello guys,

in our system like 30% of V* transactions have slow update.
Example: VA01, VA02, VA22, VT02n, VT03n, VF11…

During this slow update, users are waiting and complaining.

In ST03n I can see, 
Update V1 = slow
Update V2 = fast

There is no bottleneck in Workprocesses (UPD*) or CPU usage or anything else.
There are also several instances where update request gets distributed.
Also no problem with hanging HTTP RFC connections (SAPLHTTP_RUNTIME...).
As far as I can see there is no locking problem in SM12.

Most of time is always used under "Processing Time".

The only thing I can see is high "RFC idle time"... can this be a reason (?)
Because "calling time" and "data send time" are pretty low.


ARCHIV_CREATE_TABLE_MULT


The UPD WP is remaining in program SAPLCEI3 without more information, only time counts...
and after 5-20 seconds it will finish.

 

This happens with ~30% of update requests in V* transactions.

Maybe you have some other ideas what to check?

Thank you.

entry.title: Free of charge samples sales for Brazil with NFE
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a new requirement from our Brazil client to implement Free of charge scenario.

We have implemented a custom solution already, but the customer master needs to be set up in a particular way so that the system can determine the tax values correctly. 

Now they are looking for a free of charge sales which can be applied to all customers. It should have a NFE generated, and net value = zero, but ICMS should be determined.

Could you please guide me on this? Is there a configuration setup which is provided in standard SAP which I can use?

Thanks,
Vishnu

entry.title: Customer Master Data - Extension
entry.content:
Hi,

For customer extension, it is mandatory that the customer master data already exists in the system — this means you can only perform the extension after the customer master has been successfully uploaded.

Separate Template for Extension:
A dedicated template is used for customer master data extension — this is different from the normal creation template, given below :

  • Customer - extend existing record by new org levels

(Here we are talking with the scenario)

Run ID is Critical:
A unique Run ID is assigned for each extension. If Customer A is being extended to 2 sales areas, then two separate Run IDs will be used, e.g.:

  • Sales Area 1: Run ID = 1

  • Sales Area 2: Run ID = 2

Sequential Processing Required:
Extension uploads must be done sequentially:
First, the uploader for Run ID 1 will be executed (for Sales Area 1),
Then, the uploader for Run ID 2 will be executed (for Sales Area 2).

Separate Uploaders for Each Run ID:
Multiple sales area extensions are not allowed in a single uploader. The system does not accept so many changes in one uploader, therefore, each Run ID must be processed in a separate uploader.

Customer Must Exist in the System:
Before performing any extension, it is mandatory that the customer master data already exists in the system. This means the extension can only be carried out after the initial customer creation/upload has been successfully completed.

Best regards,

Tehreem Fatima

entry.title: Ship to party
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP Public cloud; There are multiple Ship-To Parties for a single customer how can we upload them without maintaining manually, one by one, against each Sold-To Party?

To explain further: let's say Customer A has 20 Ship-To Parties. How can we upload them efficiently and save time? I’ve already uploaded 100+ Ship-To Parties into the system, but now assigning each one individually to the corresponding Sold-To Party feels like a very time-consuming task.

Is there no shortcut or quicker method to assign these Ship-To Parties in bulk?

Best regards,

entry.title: Looking to Understand User Exits in SAP SD with Real-Time Case Studies
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I’m currently working in the SAP SD module and looking to expand my knowledge in the area of User Exits, specifically within the Sales and Distribution (SD) domain.

I would like to mention that I am completely new to this functionality and eager to understand it from the ground up. I’ve come across the term "User Exit" quite often in discussions related to customization and enhancements, but I’m still unclear about:

  • What exactly are User Exits and how do they differ from BADIs or Enhancements?

  • Where and how are they implemented in SAP SD?

  • What are some real-time business use cases where User Exits have been effectively used to solve specific problems or meet business requirements?

If possible, I would greatly appreciate step-by-step explanations or references to detailed examples that can help a beginner like me understand this concept in depth. Any inputs, documents, or links would be very helpful!

Thanks in advance for your time and guidance.

Best regards,
Sobhagya Thapa

entry.title: LIKP-TM_WHSE_EXEC value is not getting updated with the value 03 when outbound delivery saved in S4
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a decentralized WM system integrated with SAP S4 HANA, As soon as outbound delivery created the delivery data will be distributed through an IDOC via output type and the delivery distribution flag(LIKP-VLSTK) should be set to B(distributed) from D(Planned for Distribution)  and warehouse execution status( LIKP-TM_WHSE_EXEC) should be set to '03'(Delivery is in Warehouse Processing). 

we are using SAP standard FM: SHP_CHG_DLV_DISTRB_STATE in the output type driver program to set the delivery distribution flag(LIKP-VLSTK)  from D(Planned for Distribution) to B(distributed) which is happening as expected.

As per standard behavior the warehouse execution status( LIKP-TM_WHSE_EXEC) should be set to '03'(Delivery is in Warehouse Processing) as soon as LIKP-VLSTK value set to B. But  it is not happening .

Seeking your advice if anything is missing from config side or any other suggestions ?

entry.title: Hi, We are also facing the same issue. has anyone found the solution to this issue?
What table for show calling hours di business partners?
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I want to know what table can display this information. I've tried to table CRMM_BUT_FRG0060, CRMM_BUT_FRG0061, & SCRULES. But the data just show like this

Please Help me.

entry.title: Restricted Access to Pricing Configuration Elements in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
I am a Junior Consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, specializing in the Sales and Distribution module. I am still becoming familiar with the system, and I am currently reviewing the topic of sales pricing configuration. When I try to access the app Implementation Activities -> General Business Data -> Price Management -> Sales Pricing -> Setting for Pricing in Sales, I only see a few configuration options available, and they do not include the basic settings needed for condition configuration, such as condition tables, pricing procedures, or access sequences.

When I try to check these configurations through CBC, I am redirected to an error page.
I have confirmed with my facilitator that I have the necessary access rights.
Do you know what might be causing this issue?

entry.title: creation of sales order from allocation table inherit a movement type in the scheduline line#retail
entry.content:
hi all 

creation of sales order from allocation table inherit a movement type in the scheduline line tab procurement ? from where that movement type is derived how can it be changed ? 

# SAP retail 

thanks

entry.title: No Notification Sent to Requestor After Approval/Rejection in Flexible Workflow (Sales Doc. S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently using Flexible Workflow for sales documents, and the approval process is generally working as expected in the Fiori environment.

Approvers can view the documents pending their action through the My Inbox app and are able to approve, reject, or send back for reprocessing. When ı accept or reject sales order , The requester is not notified. For example, whether your order is approved or rejected.

SO, after the approver makes a decision (either approve or reject), the requestor does not receive any kind of notification.

Fiori notification is triggered. I completed nofitication settings, no problem

Nothing appears in the requestor’s My Inbox or Notifications section indicating the outcome.

We would like the requestor to be informed when the status of the document they submitted changes.
Is there a way to enable this kind of notification automatically within the standard functionality?

Worfklow senario send you;

Any suggestions or experience shared would be highly appreciated.


Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Create Sales Order with Billing Plan through API in S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create an Sales Order with Billing plan in an external call from SAP Cloud Integration. 

For that I tried to use API_SALES_ORDER_SRV, but reading through the documentation I found the following:

"With this service, it is not possible to:...Use the following entities that are displayed on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub on the API Reference tab and the Schema View tab: Header Billing Plan, Header Billing Plan Item, Item Billing Plan, and Item Billing Plan Item."

And also the note 3440728 mentioning this feature is not available for on premise and cloud private installations and its solution is to wait for S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, but in this release documentation mention this feature is still not available(Although I'm on 2023 FPS02 so I can't verify it)

Looking for the A2A API SalesOrderBulkRequest_In, I could not find anything regarding Billing plan which, for me, means it also do not support it.

Side note is that in Public Cloud this feature is already delivered.

Having said that, what are my possibilities here? Is there another API that I can use to create these Billing Plans in Sales Orders? Maybe I can create a regular SO then append this BPs somehow.

entry.title: Dynamic Table Reading in SAP ABAP & Pricing Integration
entry.content:
In SAP projects—especially in pricing scenarios—table structures can get pretty dynamic. In this article, I’ll walk you through a method called get_data_price_service that reads various pricing condition tables at runtime, along with its supporting CDS view ZCRSD_CDS018. Our goal? Process pricing data flexibly within SAP and prepare it for external integrations like Salesforce. 

 

🎯 What Are We Trying to Do?

Our goal is to:

  • Dynamically determine which SAP condition tables to use (e.g., A960, A961, etc.)

  • Read data from these tables at runtime

  • Transform and structure the result into something like ZCRSD_S063

  • Send it to external systems if needed (Salesforce)

 

To link pricing condition types (like ZL01, ZP00) to their respective tables, we first define a CDS view.

define view ZCRSD_CDS018
  as select from t685       as b
    inner join   zcrsd_t062 as c on c.kosul_turu = b.kschl
    inner join   t682i      as a on a.kozgf = b.kozgf
{
  a.kolnr,
  a.kotabnr,
  b.kozgf,
  c.kosul_turu
}
where
      b.kvewe = 'A'
  and b.kappl = 'V'
  and a.kvewe = 'A'
  and a.kappl = 'V'

🔧 What Does This Do?

This view fetches:

  • Condition types from ZCRSD_T062 (e.g., ZL01, ZP01)

  • Joins with T685 and T682I to retrieve KOZGF, then KOLNR/KOTABNR

  • In the end, it tells us which condition type corresponds to which condition table, e.g., A960

This mapping is critical for dynamic data fetching.

 

💻 ABAP Method: get_data_price_service

This method:

  1. Reads the CDS view to fetch all KOTABNR values

  2. Builds dynamic SQL queries using these KOTABNRs (A{KOTABNR} style)

  3. Reads table fields dynamically using DDIF_FIELDINFO_GET

  4. Constructs a valid SELECT statement, even avoiding reserved SQL keywords

  5. Filters by KAPPL and KSCHL, retrieves valid data

  6. Transforms the results into a structured output (ZCRSD_S063-like)

  7. Optionally sends the data to external systems like Salesforce

  METHOD get_data_price_service.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_knumh,
             knumh TYPE konh-knumh,
           END OF ty_knumh.

    DATA: lt_knumh TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_knumh WITH EMPTY KEY,
          ls_knumh TYPE ty_knumh.

    DATA: lt_output TYPE zcrsd_tt024,
          ls_output TYPE zcrsd_s063.


    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_line2>  TYPE any,
                   <knumh_val> TYPE any,
                   <fs_colval> TYPE any.

    DATA: lt_components  TYPE cl_abap_structdescr=>component_table,
          lr_structdescr TYPE REF TO cl_abap_structdescr,
          lr_tabledescr  TYPE REF TO cl_abap_tabledescr,
          lr_data        TYPE REF TO data,
          ls_component   TYPE cl_abap_structdescr=>component,
          lr_fieldcat    TYPE TABLE OF dd03p,
          lv_dyn_table   TYPE tabname,
          lt_all_fields  TYPE SORTED TABLE OF fieldname WITH UNIQUE KEY table_line,
          lt_t685        TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zcrsd_cds018,
          lt_data_final  TYPE REF TO data,
          lt_result      TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF string,
          lv_sql         TYPE string,
          lv_fields      TYPE string.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_result> TYPE STANDARD TABLE,
                   <fs_line>   TYPE REF TO data,
                   <dyn_table> TYPE STANDARD TABLE,
                   <dyn_wa>    TYPE any,
                   <field>     TYPE any.

    DATA: lr_stmt              TYPE REF TO cl_sql_statement,
          lr_sql               TYPE REF TO cl_sql_result_set,
          lv_line              TYPE string,
          lv_safe_col          TYPE string,
          lv_clean_col         TYPE string,
          lt_reserved_keywords TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF string,
          lv_keyword           TYPE string,
          lv_where             TYPE string.

    lt_reserved_keywords = VALUE string_table(
     ( `WITH` ) ( `GROUP` ) ( `ORDER` ) ( `USER` ) ( `VALUE` ) ( `SELECT` ) ( `FROM` ) ).

    SELECT * FROM zcrsd_cds018 INTO TABLE @LT_t685.

    LOOP AT lt_t685 INTO DATA(ls_table).
      lv_dyn_table = |A{ ls_table-kotabnr }|.

      CALL FUNCTION 'DDIF_FIELDINFO_GET'
        EXPORTING
          tabname   = lv_dyn_table
        TABLES
          dfies_tab = lr_fieldcat
        EXCEPTIONS
          OTHERS    = 1.

      LOOP AT lr_fieldcat INTO DATA(ls_field).
        IF ls_field-fieldname IS INITIAL.
          CONTINUE.
        ENDIF.
        INSERT ls_field-fieldname INTO TABLE lt_all_fields.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDLOOP.

    LOOP AT lt_all_fields INTO DATA(lv_fieldname).
      CLEAR ls_component.
      LOOP AT lt_reserved_keywords INTO lv_keyword.
        IF lv_fieldname = lv_keyword.
          lv_fieldname = |FIELD_{ lv_fieldname }|.
          EXIT.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
      ls_component-name = lv_fieldname.
      ls_component-type = cl_abap_elemdescr=>get_c( 100 ).
      APPEND ls_component TO lt_components.
    ENDLOOP.

    lr_structdescr = cl_abap_structdescr=>create( lt_components ).
    lr_tabledescr  = cl_abap_tabledescr=>create( lr_structdescr ).

    CREATE DATA lt_data_final TYPE HANDLE lr_tabledescr.
    ASSIGN lt_data_final->* TO <fs_result>.

    LOOP AT lt_t685 INTO DATA(ls_k).
      lv_dyn_table = |A{ ls_k-kotabnr }|.

      CALL FUNCTION 'DDIF_FIELDINFO_GET'
        EXPORTING
          tabname   = lv_dyn_table
        TABLES
          dfies_tab = lr_fieldcat
        EXCEPTIONS
          OTHERS    = 1.

      REFRESH lt_result.
      CLEAR lv_fields.

      LOOP AT lt_all_fields INTO DATA(lv_col).
        DATA(has_column) = abap_false.
        READ TABLE lr_fieldcat TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS WITH KEY fieldname = lv_col.
        IF sy-subrc = 0.
          has_column = abap_true.
        ENDIF.

        CLEAR: lv_safe_col, lv_clean_col.
        lv_safe_col = lv_col.
        lv_clean_col = lv_col.
        CONDENSE lv_clean_col.

        TRY.
            IF lv_clean_col IS NOT INITIAL AND strlen( lv_clean_col ) > 0.
              REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ' ' IN lv_clean_col WITH ''.
            ENDIF.
          CATCH cx_sy_replace_infinite_loop.
        ENDTRY.

        TRANSLATE lv_clean_col TO UPPER CASE.
        lv_safe_col = lv_clean_col.

        LOOP AT lt_reserved_keywords INTO lv_keyword.
          IF lv_col = lv_keyword.
            lv_safe_col = |FIELD_{ lv_col }|.
            EXIT.
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

        IF has_column = abap_true.
          CONCATENATE lv_col 'AS' '"' lv_safe_col '"' INTO lv_line SEPARATED BY space.
        ELSE.
          CONCATENATE 'NULL' 'AS' '"' lv_safe_col '"' INTO lv_line SEPARATED BY space.
        ENDIF.

        APPEND lv_line TO lt_result.
      ENDLOOP.

      LOOP AT lt_result INTO DATA(lv_piece).
        IF lv_fields IS INITIAL.
          lv_fields = lv_piece.
        ELSE.
          CONCATENATE lv_fields ',' lv_piece INTO lv_fields SEPARATED BY space.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.

      DATA(lv_kschl) = |{ ls_k-kosul_turu ALPHA = OUT }|.
      CONDENSE lv_kschl NO-GAPS.
      lv_kschl = to_upper( val = lv_kschl ).

      DATA has_kappl TYPE abap_bool VALUE abap_false.
      READ TABLE lr_fieldcat WITH KEY fieldname = 'KAPPL' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        has_kappl = abap_true.
      ENDIF.

      DATA has_kschl TYPE abap_bool VALUE abap_false.
      READ TABLE lr_fieldcat WITH KEY fieldname = 'KSCHL' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        has_kschl = abap_true.
      ENDIF.

      lv_where = |kappl = 'V' AND kschl = '{ lv_kschl }'|.

      IF lv_where IS NOT INITIAL.
        CONCATENATE 'SELECT' lv_fields 'FROM' lv_dyn_table 'WHERE' lv_where INTO lv_sql SEPARATED BY space.
      ELSE.
        CONCATENATE 'SELECT' lv_fields 'FROM' lv_dyn_table INTO lv_sql SEPARATED BY space.
      ENDIF.

      TRY.
          lr_stmt = NEW cl_sql_statement( ).
          lr_sql = lr_stmt->execute_query( lv_sql ).

          CREATE DATA lr_data TYPE HANDLE lr_tabledescr.
          ASSIGN lr_data->* TO <dyn_table>.

          lr_sql->set_param_table( REF #( <dyn_table> ) ).
          lr_sql->next_package( ).

          LOOP AT <dyn_table> ASSIGNING <dyn_wa>.
            APPEND <dyn_wa> TO <fs_result>.
          ENDLOOP.
        CATCH cx_sql_exception INTO DATA(lx).
          MESSAGE lx->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      ENDTRY.
    ENDLOOP.


    LOOP AT <fs_result> ASSIGNING <fs_line2>.
      ASSIGN COMPONENT 'DATAB' OF STRUCTURE <fs_line2> TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<lv_datab>).
      ASSIGN COMPONENT 'DATBI' OF STRUCTURE <fs_line2> TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<lv_datbi>).

      IF sy-subrc = 0 AND ( <lv_datab> > sy-datum OR <lv_datbi> < sy-datum ).
        DELETE <fs_result> INDEX sy-tabix.
      ELSE.
        ASSIGN COMPONENT 'KNUMH' OF STRUCTURE <fs_line2> TO <knumh_val>.
        IF sy-subrc = 0 AND <knumh_val> IS NOT INITIAL.
          ls_knumh-knumh = <knumh_val>.
          APPEND ls_knumh TO lt_knumh.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_knumh.

    IF lt_knumh IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM zcrsd_cds023
        INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_konh)
        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_knumh
        WHERE knumh = @LT_knumh-knumh.
    ENDIF.

    SORT lt_konh BY kotabnr ASCENDING.

    SELECT * FROM zcrsd_cds024
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_konp)
        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_konh
        WHERE knumh = @LT_konh-knumh.

    LOOP AT <fs_result> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).
      LOOP AT lt_all_fields INTO DATA(lv_colname).
        DATA lv_knumh TYPE knumh.
        ASSIGN COMPONENT lv_colname OF STRUCTURE <fs> TO <fs_colval>.
        IF sy-subrc = 0.
          CASE lv_colname.
            WHEN 'ALAND'.
              ls_output-ulke = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'AUART_SD'.
              ls_output-satis_belge_tur = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'AUGRU'.
              ls_output-siparis_neden = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'BONUS'.
              ls_output-prim_grubu = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'DATAB'.
              ls_output-gecerlilik_bas = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'DATBI'.
              ls_output-gecerlilik_bit = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KAPPL'.
              ls_output-kappl = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KBSTAT'.
              ls_output-kbstat = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KFRST'.
              ls_output-kfrst = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KNUMH'.
              ls_output-sap_kosul_kayit_no = <fs_colval>.
              lv_knumh = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KONDM'.
              ls_output-fiyat_grubu = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KSCHL'.
              ls_output-kosul_turu = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KUKLA'.
              ls_output-musteri_siniflama = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KUNAG'.
              ls_output-siparis_veren = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'KUNNR'.
              ls_output-musteri_no = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'LLAND'.
              ls_output-teslim_alan_ulke = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'MATKL'.
              ls_output-mal_grubu = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'MATNR'.
              ls_output-malzeme_no = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'PLTYP'.
              ls_output-fiyat_listesi = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'PSTYV'.
              ls_output-kalem_tipi = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'SPART'.
              ls_output-bolum = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'TAXK1'.
              ls_output-musteri_vergi_sinif = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'TAXM1'.
              ls_output-malzeme_vergi_sinif = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'UPMAT'.
              ls_output-upmat = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'VKORG'.
              ls_output-satis_org = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'VTWEG'.
              ls_output-dagitim_kanal = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'WAERK'.
              ls_output-para_birimi = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'ZTERM'.
              ls_output-odeme_kosul_anahtar = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'ZZKDKG1'.
              ls_output-satis_kosullari = <fs_colval>.
            WHEN 'ZZMSTAE'.
              ls_output-kalite = <fs_colval>.
          ENDCASE.
        ENDIF.

      ENDLOOP.
      READ TABLE lt_konh INTO DATA(ls_konh) WITH KEY knumh = lv_knumh.
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        ls_output-tablo_adi = ls_konh-kotabnr.
      ENDIF.

      READ TABLE lt_konp INTO DATA(ls_konp) WITH KEY knumh = lv_knumh.
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        ls_output-kosul_tutar_or_yuzde_orani = ls_konp-kbetr.
        ls_output-kosul_birim_pb_or_yuzde = ls_konp-konwa.
        ls_output-kosul_para_birim = ls_konp-kpein.
        ls_output-kosul_birim = ls_konp-kmein.
      ENDIF.

      APPEND ls_output TO lt_output.
      CLEAR: ls_output, lv_knumh.
    ENDLOOP.

    rt_price_data = lt_output.

    IF iv_send = 'X'.
      send_data(
        EXPORTING
          it_datas = lt_output ).
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

📤 Integration & Outcome

With this approach:

  • You don’t need to hardcode table names

  • You get flexible, type-safe field access

  • One method can prepare and send pricing data to anywhere

 

🧾 Conclusion

If you're building dynamic pricing logic in SAP, this method gives you full control. Combined with a solid CDS view, you ensure your integration is:

  • Dynamic

  • Scalable

  • Maintainable

Use this setup to supercharge your integration between SAP and systems like Salesforce.

entry.title: Smq2 Post goods issue not allowed User Status SD, object VB
entry.content:
EP1 100

Warehouse number 4107

sqm2 error post goods issue not allowed User Status SD, object VB3000397228000020. 

We have unblocked the regulation, ZNFPA that was blocked previously. Sales order still show the user Status SD. While updating the user status to blank, but it revert back to user status SD on the Sales order 3000397228 and not able to chance the status to blank. We need to post the good issue in ECC.
